_comment: Why this server uses a hardcoded `node dist/cli.cjs` path instead of `npx @ansible/ansible-mcp-server`:
The published `@ansible/ansible-mcp-server` npm package has a packaging bug — its `bin` field points at
an ESM bundle (`dist/cli.js`) that throws `Dynamic require of "process" is not supported` on Node >= 22.
Once upstream points `bin` at the CJS file (or fixes the ESM bundle), revert the `command`/`args` below to:
The hardcoded path above is the npx cache copy of v26.4.6. To refresh and update the path if the hash
